tool_purpose: A fine-tuned version of the multi-modal LayoutLM model for the task of question answering on documents. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Question Answering. API call: pipeline('question-answering', model=LayoutLMForQuestionAnswering.from_pretrained('impira/layoutlm-document-qa', return_dict=True)).
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
